goal: Call the ECR module from dev and prod root modules, pass the service_names list, declare variables and tfvars, and run project-wide formatting/validation.
summary: Wired the ECR module into both dev and prod environments: module calls, service_names variables, and tfvars populated for all 8 services. Project-wide terraform fmt and validate passed in both environments. Prod main.tf was corrected to use hardcoded project and no undefined local tags.
stepSummaries:
1. Update terraform/environments/dev/main.tf to call module.ecr with service_names from var.service_names. [verified]
  2. Update terraform/environments/dev/variables.tf to declare service_names variable. [verified]
  3. Update terraform/environments/dev/terraform.tfvars with the list of 8 service names. [verified]
  4. Update terraform/environments/prod/main.tf to call module.ecr with service_names from var.service_names. [verified]
  5. Update terraform/environments/prod/variables.tf to declare service_names variable. [verified]
  6. Update terraform/environments/prod/terraform.tfvars with the list of 8 service names. [verified]
  7. Run project-wide terraform fmt check and validate both environments. [verified]

gateVerdicts.rationale: All steps used real verification: grep, terraform fmt, terraform validate.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 7 ran terraform fmt -recursive -check terraform/ and terraform validate in dev/prod, both returned success.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal met: module.ecr is called in dev/prod main.tf, service_names declared in variables.tf and set in tfvars for both envs, and validation passes.
